scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @auctioneer/server" "npm run dev --workspace @auctioneer/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @auctioneer/shared && npm run build --workspace @auctioneer/engine && npm run build --workspace @auctioneer/server && npm run build --workspace @auctioneer/web
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:prod --workspace @auctioneer/shared && npm run build:prod --workspace @auctioneer/engine && npm run build:prod --workspace @auctioneer/server && npm run build --workspace @auctioneer/web
scripts.test:socket: tsx apps/server/test/security.test.ts && tsx apps/server/test/socket-flow.test.ts && tsx apps/server/test/recovery.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:socket
